hero.desc1: I like understanding how things work, taking them apart, and rebuilding them better.
hero.desc2: Most of what I've learned came from curiosity and tackling real problems: researching, testing, failing, and finding a solution that makes sense. I enjoy both the technical side of development and the analysis behind each decision.
hero.desc3: I'm currently deepening my knowledge in data structures with Java, networking with a focus on cybersecurity, and interface design with Figma.
